payload.answer: I can remember that you wanted to save the URL https://example.com/missing because it may be useful for memory architecture, but I cannot store any article-derived facts because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.
citations: Input: Remember this article: https://example.com/missing why: useful for memory architecture.
Input: Mock fetch result: 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content was unavailable due to a 404 network error, so no claims from the article can be extracted or committed.

memory_cards.statement: The user wanted to remember the article URL https://example.com/missing for the reason: useful for memory architecture.
The requested article URL https://example.com/missing could not be fetched; the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

details: Recorded the user’s intent and URL only.
Did not commit article content or claims because the URL fetch failed with a 404 network error.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Provide a summary you want remembered, clearly marked as your own summary.
